title: Large pothole near Majestic Bus Stand causing accidents
description: There is a massive pothole approximately 2 feet wide and 8 inches deep on the service road parallel to Gubbi Thotadappa Road near Majestic Bus Stand. Two-wheelers have already skidded here. The pothole has been there for over 3 weeks and worsens with every rain.
landmark: Opposite KPN Travels office, Majestic

title: Series of potholes on Anna Salai near LIC Building damaging vehicles
description: Multiple potholes have formed on Anna Salai (Mount Road) near the LIC building stretch. At least 6–7 craters are visible in a 200-metre stretch. A car's tyre burst there yesterday. This is one of Chennai's busiest roads and the situation is dangerous especially at night when potholes are not visible.
landmark: Anna Salai near LIC Building, Chennai

title: Dangerous potholes on CG Road near Navrangpura causing two-wheeler accidents
description: CG Road near the Navrangpura police chowky has developed severe potholes after the last round of water pipe work. Three motorcyclists have reportedly fallen in the past two weeks. The damaged stretch is approximately 300 metres long. AMC repair teams have put a barricade but no repair work has started.
landmark: Near Navrangpura Police Chowky, CG Road
rejection_reason: This road section falls under NHAI jurisdiction and is currently under a scheduled upgrade project (NH48 widening). Repair will be carried out as part of the project. ETA: 60 days.

title: NH16 bypass pothole near Bhubaneswar airport road causing tyre damage
description: A stretch of about 400 metres on the NH16 bypass near the Bhubaneswar Airport access road has multiple deep potholes. Heavy vehicles have worsened the craters. At least 4 tyre puncture repair shops have popped up nearby — a clear indicator of the damage being caused. NHAI's local office has been informed with no response in 3 weeks.
landmark: Airport Access Road, NH16 Bypass near Bhubaneswar Airport

title: Pothole on Jubilee Hills Road No. 36 damaging car suspensions
description: Road No. 36 in Jubilee Hills has a massive pothole near the PVR complex that has been growing for weeks. Multiple residents have reported suspension damage to their cars. The pothole is about 3 feet wide and nearly 10 inches deep. Despite being in one of Hyderabad's premium localities, GHMC has shown no urgency in addressing this.
landmark: Near PVR Cinemas, Road No. 36, Jubilee Hills

title: Tonk Road potholes near SMS Hospital causing traffic jams in Jaipur
description: Tonk Road near SMS Hospital, Jaipur has developed multiple potholes after recent water pipeline work by PHED. The trenches dug for pipeline repair were filled poorly and have caved in. The stretch near Milap Chowk is the worst — 8 potholes in 150 metres. Morning traffic jams are worsening due to vehicles slowing down. JMC has not responded to the complaint filed 2 weeks ago.
landmark: Milap Chowk, Tonk Road near SMS Hospital

title: Sion-Panvel Highway pothole near Chembur flyover causing accidents at night
description: A very deep pothole (roughly 12 inches deep) on the Sion-Panvel Highway near the Chembur flyover on-ramp has already caused 2 vehicle accidents this week. The pothole is not visible at night due to lack of street lighting in that stretch. A temporary marker was placed but has since disappeared. MSRDC must be held accountable.
landmark: Chembur Flyover On-ramp, Sion-Panvel Highway

title: Huge pothole near Secunderabad railway station auto stand ruining vehicle axles
description: The road near the Secunderabad Railway Station auto rickshaw stand has a crater-sized pothole spanning nearly the full lane width. Autos loaded with passengers are struggling to navigate. One auto toppled sideways last week injuring a passenger. GHMC Ward No. 4 has been notified. No response. The pothole is worsening with each passing vehicle.
landmark: Near Secunderabad Railway Station Auto Stand
rejection_reason: This road is under Railway Zone jurisdiction (South Central Railway). GHMC does not have authority to carry out repairs. Please contact SCR Divisional Office directly or raise on PG Portal under Ministry of Railways.

title: Eastern Express Highway potholes near Vikhroli causing peak hour chaos
description: The Eastern Express Highway near Vikhroli exit has 4 large potholes on the slow lane that are causing vehicles to brake suddenly during peak hours, leading to near-collision situations daily. This is a high-speed road and any accident here can be fatal. MSRDC should treat this as an emergency repair.
landmark: Vikhroli Exit, Eastern Express Highway

title: Potholes on Vytilla-Vyttila bypass making night driving extremely risky
description: The Vytilla-Palarivattom bypass near HiLITE Mall access road has developed 5 large potholes over the past month. Night driving is especially dangerous as the stretch has no adequate lighting. Buses and two-wheelers have swerved dangerously. A loaded goods vehicle nearly toppled last night. PWD Kerala has been notified with no response.
landmark: Near HiLITE Mall Access Road, Vyttila Bypass

title: Pothole on Outer Ring Road near Dwarka Sector 10 causing daily jams
description: The Outer Ring Road near Dwarka Sector 10 has a series of potholes that have developed after the DUSIB pipe-laying work last month. The road was dug up, poorly backfilled, and now has 6 potholes in a 250-metre stretch. The left lane is nearly unusable. During evening peak hours, the resulting lane narrowing causes a 45-minute traffic jam daily.
landmark: Outer Ring Road near Dwarka Sector 10 Metro

title: New Market Road Bhopal pothole swallowed a motorcycle wheel last week
description: Near Chowk Bazaar on New Market Road, a pothole roughly 2 feet wide and 14 inches deep has formed at the side of the main carriageway. A motorcycle's front wheel got lodged in it last week, throwing the rider off. The rider sustained minor injuries. The pothole is unmarked and in a busy commercial area with heavy two-wheeler traffic. BMC ward office notified — no action.
landmark: Chowk Bazaar, New Market Road

title: Mehrauli-Badarpur Road potholes near Govindpuri metro creating danger
description: The MB Road near Govindpuri metro has 3 adjacent potholes in the centre lane. One of them is nearly 15 inches deep. Night buses and tempos have narrowly avoided accidents multiple times. The road lights are also not working on this stretch, making this particularly dangerous. PWD Delhi needs to address this immediately.
landmark: Near Govindpuri Metro Station, MB Road

title: Seaport-Airport Road potholes near Infopark Kochi causing IT professional commute issues
description: The Seaport-Airport Road leading to Infopark Campus 1 in Kakkanad has developed multiple deep potholes in the past month. Thousands of IT employees commute on this road daily. Cars are getting damaged. The road was relaid just 18 months ago — the quality of work was clearly substandard. PWD complaint registered. No response.
landmark: Near Infopark Campus 1, Kakkanad

title: Satara Road pothole near Swargate causing bus delays and vehicle damage
description: Satara Road near Swargate bus depot has a deep pothole that is causing PMPML buses to slow down significantly, adding 5–10 minutes to routes. Bus passengers are complaining of jolts. A private cab suffered a broken axle last week. PMC has been informed (PMC Ref: PMC-ROAD-2024-5543) — no action in 15 days.
landmark: Near Swargate PMPML Bus Depot, Satara Road

title: Bannerghatta Road potholes near JP Nagar 7th Phase causing school bus delays
description: Bannerghatta Road near JP Nagar 7th Phase has severe potholes developed after BWSSB pipe work. Three school buses have reported delayed arrivals due to slowed speeds on this stretch. Parents are furious. The stretch is about 500 metres and has at least 10 major potholes. BBMP complaint lodged 20 days ago — only 2 potholes filled, 8 remain.
landmark: Bannerghatta Road near JP Nagar 7th Phase Signal

title: Malad West Link Road pothole cluster making road nearly impassable
description: S V Road near Malad West has developed 7 potholes in a single 100-metre stretch near Mindspace. The road is narrow to begin with and the potholes occupy most of the drivable width. IT park employees commuting to Mindspace are delayed daily. BMC Ward O-North has received the complaint — response says 'under review' for 18 days.
landmark: SV Road near Mindspace IT Park, Malad West

title: GST Road pothole near Chromepet causing heavy vehicle accidents
description: The GST Road (NH-32) near Chromepet flyover has a large pothole in the fast lane. A loaded lorry swerved suddenly last week to avoid it and side-scraped a divider. The pothole is in a high-speed zone where vehicles do 70–80 km/h. NHAI has been notified but the complaint is being bounced between NHAI and NHIDCL. Nobody is taking ownership.
landmark: GST Road (NH-32) near Chromepet Flyover
rejection_reason: GST Road (NH-32) is a National Highway under NHAI maintenance. This complaint has been transferred to NHAI Regional Office, Chennai. Please track via NHAI helpline 1033 or pgportal.gov.in for status updates.

title: Faizabad Road pothole near Indira Nagar Lucknow damaged three autos in a week
description: Faizabad Road near the Indira Nagar Chauraha has 4 consecutive potholes that have caused visible damage to at least 3 auto-rickshaws in the past week. One driver had to spend ₹3,200 on suspension repair. The road was dug up by LESA for a transformer cable and was left improperly patched. LMC has been unresponsive.
landmark: Indira Nagar Chauraha, Faizabad Road

title: Kowdiar main road pothole in front of government office causing irony
description: There is a gaping pothole directly in front of the District Collectorate entrance on Kowdiar main road, Thiruvananthapuram. The irony is that this is the building where road complaints would theoretically be routed. The pothole has been there for 3 weeks. Government staff, visitors and petitioners are all affected. Multiple RTI applications about road maintenance in this ward are pending.
landmark: In front of District Collectorate, Kowdiar

title: Rasulgarh road pothole near bus stand damaging goods vehicles daily
description: A major pothole has formed on the Rasulgarh main road, Bhubaneswar near the bus stand. Loaded goods vehicles delivering to the Rasulgarh market area hit this pothole multiple times a day, damaging their suspensions and spilling goods. Merchants are furious. BDA has been informed but the complaint is simply being acknowledged with no action for 25 days.
landmark: Rasulgarh Bus Stand, Rasulgarh Main Road

title: Kalyani Nagar road pothole near bridge causing daily congestion in Pune
description: The road leading to the Kalyani Nagar bridge in Pune has a massive pothole cluster near the bridge approach. Morning and evening rush hours see severe jams as vehicles avoid the potholes, merging into a single lane. Near-miss collisions are daily occurrences. Despite Kalyani Nagar being one of Pune's most developed areas, road maintenance is appalling. PMC Ref: PMC-ROAD-2024-6801.
landmark: Kalyani Nagar Bridge Approach Road
